name: hf-document
description: MCP specification for the hedge fund document agent. Assembles and submits KYC/AML and credit documents.

tools.name: assemble_documents
tools.description: Assemble client documents in response to a bank data request. Returns a hash of the assembled document bundle.

oracle_type.description: Which oracle issued the data request

spec_hash.description: keccak256 of the document specification from the bank

data_hash.description: keccak256 of the assembled document bundle

prompts.name: document_assembly
prompts.description: Hedge fund document assembly prompt for KYC/AML and credit compliance.

arguments.name: oracle_type
arguments.description: Which oracle issued the data request (aml or credit)

prompts.template:
You are a hedge fund compliance officer assembling {{oracle_type}} documentation for flow {{flow_id}}.

Assemble complete, accurate documentation as required.
Include: corporate structure, beneficial ownership, financial statements, source of funds.

langchain_messages.content:
You are a hedge fund compliance officer assembling {oracle_type} documentation for flow {flow_id}.

Assemble complete, accurate documentation as required.
Include: corporate structure, beneficial ownership, financial statements, source of funds.
